name: Bol.com Shopping Platform
description: Complete bol.com e-commerce platform model with class, use case, and activity diagrams

diagrams.name: Bol.com Domain Class Diagram
diagrams.description: Core domain classes for the bol.com e-commerce platform

diagrams.name: Bol.com Use Case Diagram
diagrams.description: Use cases for the bol.com e-commerce platform actors

diagrams.name: Purchase Product Activity Diagram
diagrams.description: Activity flow for a customer purchasing a product on bol.com

attributes.name: parent_category_id
attributes.description: FK to parent Category for breadcrumb

attributes.name: ships_from
attributes.description: Country or region seller ships from

attributes.name: item_count
attributes.description: Total number of items in cart

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Removes all items from the cart

attributes.name: unit_price
attributes.description: Price at time of adding to cart

attributes.name: total_amount
attributes.description: Sum of all OrderLine subtotals + shipping

attributes.name: is_verified_purchase
attributes.description: Whether reviewer actually bought the product

attributes.name: is_primary
attributes.description: Whether this is the hero image

attributes.name: cutoff_time
attributes.description: Order before this time for same/next day

attributes.name: return_policy_days
attributes.description: Days customer has to return product

attributes.name: is_default
attributes.description: Whether this is the default shipping address

data.name: Browse and Search Products
data.precondition: Customer is on the bol.com homepage or search page
data.postcondition: Customer sees a list of matching products
data.trigger: Customer enters a search query or browses a category

data.name: View Product Detail Page
data.precondition: Customer has found a product in search or browse results
data.postcondition: Customer views full product information including images, specs, and reviews

data.name: Add Product to Cart
data.precondition: Customer is logged in and product is in stock
data.postcondition: Product is added to the customer's cart

data.name: Purchase Product
data.precondition: Customer has at least one item in the cart and is logged in
data.postcondition: Order is created, payment is processed, and confirmation is sent

data.name: Track Order
data.postcondition: Customer sees current delivery status and estimated arrival

data.name: Write Product Review
data.precondition: Customer has received the product (verified purchase)
data.postcondition: Review is submitted and visible on the product page

data.name: Manage Account
data.postcondition: Account settings or addresses are updated

data.name: Manage Product Listings
data.precondition: Seller is logged in with an active seller account
data.postcondition: Product listings are created or updated in the catalogue
data.trigger: Seller navigates to the seller portal

data.name: Process Payment
data.precondition: Customer submits payment details during checkout
data.postcondition: Payment is authorised or declined by the payment gateway

data.name: Send Order Confirmation
data.precondition: Order has been successfully created after payment
data.postcondition: Confirmation email is sent to the customer
data.trigger: System detects a newly confirmed order

data.name: View Cart
data.localPrecondition: Customer has items in the cart
data.localPostcondition: Customer reviews cart contents and total

data.name: Select Payment Method
data.localPostcondition: Payment method is chosen (iDEAL, credit card, etc.)

data.name: Process Payment
data.localPrecondition: Payment method selected and details entered

data.name: Update Inventory
data.localPostcondition: Product stock_quantity decremented for each order line

data.name: Show Payment Error
data.localPostcondition: Error message displayed; customer offered to retry
